name: Prose Only Approval Advisory
description: Informal approval may be mentioned in prose, but no configured gate exists.
outcome: A release note is delivered without turning prose-only approval into a blocking workflow control.

definition.process_instructions: Create the release note packet. Team members may mention that an informal approval would be nice before release, but this playbook has no configured human gate and no approval rule. Prose-only approval requests are advisory and must not block completion.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What the release note packet should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: release-note
stages.goal: The release note packet is ready to ship.

checkpoints.name: release-note
checkpoints.goal: The release note packet is ready to ship.
